settings.title: Quality You Can Trust.
settings.lead: Global Hair Direct supplies braiding hair, bulk hair, and premium hair extensions directly to salon owners, distributors, and individual buyers across all 36 Nigerian states — with consistent quality, transparent pricing, and accountable delivery every order.
settings.notice_text: Bone Straight, French Curl & Deep Wave — order now and receive 5% discount on your total. Wholesale pricing available for salon and distributor accounts.

settings.title: One Standard.
settings.lead: Global Hair Direct supplies quality hair products directly to Nigerian buyers — salon owners, beauty distributors, and individuals — with fair wholesale pricing, multiple colour options, and reliable nationwide delivery on every order.

settings.label: What we are:
settings.text: A direct hair supplier servicing salon owners, distributors, and individual buyers across all 36 Nigerian states.

settings.label: What we supply:
settings.text: Braiding hair, bulk hair, and curl hair — with premium human hair extensions launching soon.

settings.label: What we offer:
settings.text: Wholesale pricing tiers, pre-order discounts, and dedicated support for salon and distributor accounts.

settings.label: What we do not do:
settings.text: Process unconfirmed orders, substitute colours without approval, or ship outside Nigeria.

settings.title: Structured Pricing.
settings.lead: Pricing reflects order volume and account type. All pricing confirmed in writing before any order is processed. No hidden charges.

settings.name: Individual Buyer
settings.perks:
Order any colour combination per product
Free delivery on orders above ₦50,000
30-day satisfaction guarantee
WhatsApp tracking from dispatch to door

settings.name: Salon Owner
settings.perks:
Salon-tier pricing across all hair types
Mixed colour orders accepted per product
Monthly standing order option available
Priority dispatch and dedicated support
First access to new product launches

settings.name: Wholesale Distributor
settings.perks:
Lowest per-unit pricing available
Full colour and product mix per order
Custom packaging options available
Dedicated account manager assigned
Net-30 payment terms for verified accounts
Multi-state distribution support

settings.title: Three reasons
settings.lead: Straightforward supply, accountable delivery, and pricing that respects how you buy — whether you are retail, salon, or wholesale.

settings.title: Direct from the source
settings.text: We focus on braiding, bulk, and curl lines with consistent grading and colour runs — so what you order is what you receive, without middlemen inflating cost or quality.

settings.title: Nationwide, with accountability
settings.text: Same-day Lagos dispatch when you confirm early; all 36 states via trusted partners. WhatsApp updates at key milestones so you always know where your order is.

settings.title: Tiers that match how you buy
settings.text: Individual, salon, and wholesale paths with clear written pricing before payment — Paystack, Flutterwave, or bank transfer. No surprise substitutions on colour without your approval.

settings.title: Stay up to date
settings.fine_print: No spam — only restocks, new lines, and offers. Unsubscribe anytime.
